title: Vertical Stacking
summary: Help the player stack buildings with platforms, stairs, entrances, and sane build order.
promptGuidelines: Use platforms and stairs as deterministic template aliases when suggesting placements.
Make sure every upper level has a pathable route to an entrance.
Recommend building support/platform pieces before dependent upper buildings.
Before placement, show a four-button confirmation menu with yes and no choices.

starterMenu.question: What stacking help do you want?
